title: rhododendron scabrum
intro: Rhododendron scabrum, also known as the rough-leaved rhododendron, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region and parts of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits such as reducing fever and treating skin conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron scabrum also include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have various medicinal and therapeutic effects.
